prompt: Read the most recent FOMC statement end to end, plus the Powell press conference transcript, plus the latest dot plot.
title: Fed — FOMC calendar (statements + press conf + SEP)
reflectionPrompt: Write a one-paragraph brief: what did the Fed do, what does the statement signal about their read of the economy, what is the dot plot implying about the next 4 quarters, and where would you push back on the Fed's framing?
